meta.title: Revenue Architecture Audit
meta.description: Answer 5 questions to diagnose the health of your revenue engine and get a personalized roadmap.

questions.text: How do you currently generate new leads?

options.label: I rely mostly on referrals and word of mouth.
I have one consistent channel (e.g., Ads or Content) but it fluctuates.
I have multiple predictable channels feeding a centralized pipeline.

questions.text: What happens when a lead enters your world?

options.label: I manually follow up when I have time.
They get a generic automated email sequence.
They enter a segmented nurture journey based on their behavior.

questions.text: How is your sales process structured?

options.label: It's different every time; I wing it.
I have a general script but often deviate.
I follow a documented methodology with defined stages and exit criteria.

questions.text: How frictionless is your closing/payment process?

options.label: I send manual invoices and wait for checks/wires.
I use a basic payment link but onboarding is manual.
Automated checkout triggers immediate onboarding and provisioning.

questions.text: How do you handle customer success and upsells?

options.label: I react to problems as they arise.
I have scheduled check-ins but no formal expansion plan.
Automated health checks drive proactive expansion opportunities.

fractured.title: Fractured Engine
fractured.description: Your revenue relies heavily on manual effort and heroics. You have pieces of the puzzle, but they aren't connected.
fractured.recommendation: We recommend the Blueprint Partnership to build your foundational infrastructure.

fragmented.title: Fragmented Engine
fragmented.description: You have some systems in place, but leaks in the handoffs are costing you growth. You're working harder than you need to.
fragmented.recommendation: The Accelerator Program is designed to optimize your existing flows and plug the leaks.

unified.title: Unified Engine
unified.description: You have a solid architecture. The next step is scaling volume and optimizing unit economics.
unified.recommendation: You are ready for the Battleship implementation or a custom Architecture Review.
